Tests if the Number object has the "MAX_VALUE" property.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks if the `Number` object in JavaScript has the property `MAX_VALUE`. The `assert` function is used to verify that `Number` includes `MAX_VALUE` as one of its properties, which represents the largest possible numeric value in JavaScript. This test ensures that the JavaScript environment correctly implements this standard property of the `Number` object. The functionality provided is narrow, focusing on a single property check within the JavaScript `Number` object.
